name: PAY_DEDUCTION_GROUPS_VL
query: SELECT pdg.DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID, pdg.BASE_NAME BASE_NAME, pdgtl.NAME NAME, pdg.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, pdg.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, pdg.BASE_DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID BASE_DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID, pdg.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, pdg.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pdg.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pdg.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pdg.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pdg.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pdg.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pdg.SEED_STATUS SEED_STATUS FROM PAY_DEDUCTION_GROUPS pdg, PAY_DEDUCTION_GROUPS_TL pdgtl WHERE pdg.DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID = pdgtl.DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID AND pdgtl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
